top_signals.title: SK Hynix’s $26.5 Billion Listing Reopens Asia Route to US Market
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix Inc.’s US share sale is set to boost an ailing vehicle that was once essential for Asian firms looking West, and Wall Street is hoping the frenzy for artificial intelligence infrastructure will encourage competitors to follow their path.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Fed’s Williams Says AI Is Now His Main Inflation Concern - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Fed’s Williams Says AI Is Now His Main Inflation Concern  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: A huge trade just happened on the Nasdaq 100. Bulls are taking notice
top_signals.summary: Tech bulls may not have to wait much longer for fresh highs, if the single-biggest trade in the Invesco QQQ Trust ETF on Thursday is any indication.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
